pages.title: Workshop Repair
pages.text: Modular equipment cannot be used in vanilla anvils.$(p)$(bold)Instead:$()$(li)Repair it at the supported MTF workstation$(li)Manage enchantments through Better Enchanting$(li)Apply a renamed Name Tag at the Toolmaker's Station$(p)This preserves its construction data.

pages.title: Finishing
pages.text: $(bold)Finishing$()$(br)Unpolished parts can be finished on a grindstone. Finish is stored separately from material and workmanship.$(p)$(bold)Renaming$()$(br)Personal names preserve construction data and survive normal stat recalculation and repair.
